headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Sempra (SRE) After Its Strong 1-Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Sempra at around US$99.75 is still offering value or starting to look stretched, you are not alone. The stock has posted returns of 0.6% over the last 7 days, 7.3% over 30 days, 11.2% year to date and 53.6% over 1 year, with a 3 year return of 41.8% and 5 year return of 69.7% that many investors will be weighing against current pricing. Recent attention on Sempra has been shaped by ongoing interest in the utilities sector and broader questions about how regulated...
